title: Italian Open: Emma Raducanu withdraws with post-viral illness shortly after media conference
description: Britain's Emma Raducanu withdraws from the Italian Open because of the post-viral illness that has kept her off the WTA Tour for two months.
content:
Britain's Emma Raducanu has withdrawn from the Italian Open because of the post-viral illness that has kept her off the WTA Tour for two months.
The British number one had been practising in Rome since Saturday and spoke to the media just 30 minutes ... [2990 chars]

title: Prosecutors to ‘fast-track’ hate crime cases in England and Wales after spate of attacks
description: Staff told to prosecute as quickly as they can, rather than waiting to gather all evidence, to tackle ‘climate of fear’ felt by Jewish community
content:
Prosecutors in England and Wales have been told to “fast-track” hate crime prosecutions after a spate of antisemitic attacks that the prime minister on Tuesday called a “crisis for all of us”.

title: Romania’s pro-Europe government collapses unleashing fresh turmoil
description: Ilie Bolojan’s coalition loses confidence vote after less than a year amid austerity drive and far-right surge
content:
Romania’s pro-European government has collapsed after losing a confidence vote, unleashing renewed political turmoil less than a year after the ruling coalition was sworn in and with the far right surging in the polls.

title: Man and ex-partner killed in Bristol blast after he forced entry into house
description: Ryan Kelly, 41, had ‘explosive device’, say police, who are treating death of woman, Jo Shaw, 35, as homicide
content:
A man forced his way into a house in Bristol with an “explosive device” a few minutes before a blast that killed his ex-partner and himself.
Police said they were treating the death of the woman, whom they believe to be 35-year-old Jo Shaw, as homici... [2987 chars]
